electronics.name: CHUWI Intel Core i5 10th Gen 1035G1 - (16 GB/512 GB SSD/Windows 11 Home) CoreBook X Grey Laptop  (14 inch, Grey, 1.40 kg)
electronics.description: Chuwi Corebook Xi5 is a sleek powerhouse that combines style and performance effortlessly. With its slim design measuring 310 x 229.5 x 17.25mm, this metal marvel packs an Intel Core i5-1035G1 processor for seamless multitasking. The 14-inch screen boasting a stunning 2160 x 1440 resolution and a 3:2 ratio ensures a visual treat. The Windows 11 Home brings a sophisticated interface, while the backlit keyboard and touchpad add convenience. Equipped with a 46.2Wh battery and an array of ports, including USB 3.2 and HDMI, it's your versatile companion.

electronics.description: The Acer Aspire 7 gaming laptop combines powerful performance with sleek portability. Equipped with an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2050, it delivers stunning graphics for immersive gameplay. Its 8GB DDR4 RAM and 512 GB PCIe SSD ensure fast load times and ample storage. The 39.62 cm (15.6) FHD display with a 144 Hz refresh rate offers crisp, fluid visuals, while the RGB backlit keyboard adds a customisable style to your setup. With Intel Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth 5.2, enjoy seamless connectivity. Weighing less than 2 kg, the Acer Aspire 7 is perfect for gaming on the go.

electronics.name: ASUS Vivobook 15 Intel Core i5 12th Gen 1235U - (16 GB/512 GB SSD/Windows 11 Home) X1504ZA-NJ549WS Thin and Light Laptop  (15.6 Inch, Quiet Blue, 1.70 kg, With MS Office)
electronics.description: The Vivobook 15, a multipurpose laptop with a 12th-generation Intel U-Series CPU, DDR4 memory, and PCIe 3.0 SSD storage, delivers remarkable performance for daily work. Its three-sided NanoEdge slim-bezel display offers breathtaking images, and its Dirac-designed audio system produces rich, immersive sound. The laptop has ASUS Antimicrobial Guard Plus for improved cleanliness, a comfortable ASUS ErgoSense keyboard, and rapid charging. In addition, it has a lay-flat hinge for effortless collaboration, a webcam privacy barrier, and several I/O ports for connection. The Vivobook 15 is dependable and fashionable, meeting US MIL-STD-810H military-grade durability requirements with its ASUS AI Noise-Canceling Technology and 3DNR for clearer video conversations.
